calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Continued To May-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Miles Ehrlich, Esq. for Plaintiff: Marcia Hatch, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
J. Daniel Sharp, Esq. for Co-Plaintiff: Heller Ehrman, not present.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission for review.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

April 10, 2007
Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Marcia Hatch and Heller Ehrman LLP. as follows:
Damages $1.00
Costs $401.68.00, for a total of $402.68
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
